prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年广西大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约39970名、37054名、34056名、120947名、73645名。2021–2023年位次在3.4万–4万之间波动，整体呈小幅前移趋势；2024年出现异常断档，位次骤降至约12万；2025年大幅回升至约73645名，但仍远高于2021–2023年水平，反映出该校在浙江的录取位次经历了一次剧烈波动后正在回稳，2025年基准位次约73645名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为58人，2026年（招生计划文件）计划仍为58人，与往年持平，无扩招或缩招，招生规模对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第94位持续上升至2026年第86位，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和声誉有所增强，对考生吸引力有一定正面作用；该校在声誉数据中未被收录，说明近年无明显负面舆情或重大声誉事件；抖音热度排名第25（较热），综合热度约183万，短视频平台有一定曝光度，但热度处于中等偏上水平，未出现极端高热或明显负面信号。投档异常数据中亦无该校断档记录；广西。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校在浙江招生的计算机类、电子科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等专业方向匹配，相关专业热度对报考有一定拉动作用；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显降温。浙江省2021–2025年考生总数从25.3万持续增长至29.1万，2026年普通高考总人数约40万，较2025年增幅约37.6%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧。；广西大学位于广西南宁，与浙江省跨省距离较远；该校在浙江招生计划仅58人，占比较小，地域偏好对报考的影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约73645名、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、浙江省2026年考生数大幅增加约37.6%（显著加剧竞争）以及专业热度分化等因素，考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应大于排名提升的正面作用，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约74145名，区间73645–74645名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（73645–74645名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档专业可作为冲刺选择，三档专业作为稳妥保底。若位次优于区间下限（即小于73645名），可重点冲刺一档的电气工程及其自动化和汉语言文学；若位次接近区间上限，建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 39,970, 37,054, 34,056, 120,947, and 73,645 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated between 34,000 and 40,000, showing a slight upward trend; in 2024, there was an abnormal gap, with rankings dropping sharply to about 120,000; in 2025, it rebounded significantly to about 73,645, still much higher than the 2021–2023 levels, indicating that the admission rankings in Zhejiang have experienced a sharp fluctuation and are now stabilizing, with a baseline ranking of about 73,645 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Guangxi University in Zhejiang's comprehensive category remained at 58 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan (according to the enrollment plan document) is still 58 students, unchanged from previous years, with no expansion or reduction, so the enrollment scale has no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, showing a continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and reputation, which has a positive effect on attracting candidates. The university is not included in reputation data, indicating no significant negative public opinion or major reputation incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, without extreme high heat or obvious negative signals. There are also no records of admission gaps for this university in abnormal admission data. Guangxi.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, matching the majors offered by Guangxi University in Zhejiang, including Computer Science, Electronic Science and Technology, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, and the popularity of these related majors has a certain pulling effect on applications. The social popularity of civil engineering and architecture majors has significantly cooled. The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province increased from 253,000 in 2021 to 291,000 in 2025, and the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, which is far from Zhejiang Province; the enrollment plan in Zhejiang is only 58 students, a relatively small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of about 73,645 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (enhancing attractiveness), the significant increase of about 37.6% in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 (significantly intensifying competition), and the divergence in major popularity, the effect of intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers outweighs the positive effect of ranking improvement. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 level. The predicted minimum ranking is about 74,145, with a range of 73,645 to 74,645.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (73,645–74,645), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (i.e., less than 73,645), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Chinese Language and Literature; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
